column3: Premature Age-Adjusted Mortality Rate - deaths per 100,000(1)

column1: HDPulse: An Ecosystem of Minority Health and Health Disparities Resources. National Institute on Minority Health and Health Disparities. Created 3/26/2026. Available from https://hdpulse.nimhd.nih.gov

1Source: Premature age-adjusted mortality data (number of deaths among residents under age 75 per 100,000 population (age-adjusted))are calculated by the County Health Rankings [ https://www.countyhealthrankings.org/explore-health-rankings/county-health-rankings-model/health-outcomes/length-of-life/premature-age-adjusted-mortality ] site using data from the National Center for Health Statistics and the National Vital Statistics System.
NA: Data not available values reflect unreliable or missing data.
